content: Actually +1. Exact same experience. And i didn't finish Arc 2 Chapter 4 too. Because of those rewards i rushed the story/everything and was thinking to buy anniv pass. And at the same time there was also an event with Thais skin(clear arc1 hard 1-7 chapters). In my opinion, it was a very bad decision to force newbies to literally rush through the entire game. As a result, I didn't make it in time, I lost the desire to buy a pass, and I was so tired that I even thought about quiting...
